title: Dual-Signal SBFL for Neuro-Symbolic NL-to-FOL KB Repair
summary: Generated a 15-page, publication-ready LaTeX paper titled 'Dual-Signal Spectrum-Based Fault Localization for Neuro-Symbolic NL-to-FOL Knowledge Base Repair'. The paper includes: Abstract, Introduction, Related Work, Methods (Dual-Signal SBFL Pipeline, Oracle Calibration Protocol, Baselines), Experiments (Setup, Main Results, Corrected Oracle Calibration, Hop-Depth Completeness Analysis, Model Capability Experiment, Atomic Fact Recall), Discussion (failure bottlenecks, positive findings, limitations, future work), and Conclusion. All 6 figures from available_figures were included: fig_pipeline_v0.jpg (full-width architecture diagram), fig_accuracy_v0.jpg (accuracy bar chart with CIs), fig_oracle_calibration_v0.jpg (perturbation calibration results), fig_hop_depth_v0.jpg (hop-depth completeness analysis), fig_model_comparison_v0.jpg (model capability comparison), and fig_recall_v0.jpg (atomic fact recall). Bibliography built via aii_semscholar_bib__fetch for 8 references; 4 additional entries (Abreu2007, Reps1997, Wang2020, Ishay2023) hand-crafted from verified paper-text info. Compiled successfully to PDF (15 pages) using pdflatex + bibtex8 + two more pdflatex passes. Visual review confirmed clean rendering across all 15 pages with no layout issues.
